clauses.clause_text: The Consultant shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Owner from and against all claims, damages, losses, and expenses arising out of or resulting from the performance of the Work, regardless of whether such claim is caused in part by the Owner's negligence.
The Consultant's total liability for all claims arising from this Agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid to the Consultant under this Agreement.

The Consultant shall maintain Professional Liability Insurance with minimum coverage of $5,000,000 per claim and $10,000,000 aggregate for the duration of this Agreement and for five years following completion.

Payment shall be made within sixty (60) days of receipt of a properly submitted invoice. The Owner reserves the right to withhold payment pending resolution of any disputes regarding the quality or completeness of the Work.

The Owner may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon fourteen (14) days written notice. Upon termination, the Consultant shall be compensated for services satisfactorily performed through the termination date, with no additional compensation for lost profits or anticipated fees.

The Consultant shall provide complete architectural and engineering design services including but not limited to schematic design, design development, construction documents, and construction administration for the 120,000 GSF laboratory and classroom facility.

The Consultant shall indemnify and hold harmless the Owner from all claims arising from the Consultant's negligent acts, errors, or omissions in the performance of professional services. This indemnification shall not extend to claims arising from the Owner's sole negligence.

The Consultant shall maintain Commercial General Liability Insurance of $2,000,000 per occurrence, Professional Liability Insurance of $10,000,000 per claim, and Cyber Liability Insurance of $5,000,000 per claim for the duration of this Agreement.

Neither party shall be liable for any consequential, incidental, special, or punitive damages arising from or related to this Agreement, regardless of whether such damages are based on warranty, contract, tort, or any other legal theory.

The Consultant shall defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the Owner and the Federal Government from and against any and all claims, damages, and expenses, including attorney's fees, arising from the Consultant's performance of services, to the fullest extent permitted by law.

Payment shall be made within thirty (30) days of receipt of a properly submitted invoice conforming to Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) requirements. Interest on late payments shall accrue at the rate established by the Prompt Payment Act.

All personnel assigned to this project shall possess or obtain a minimum Secret-level security clearance prior to accessing project facilities or Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI). The Consultant shall comply with all applicable NIST SP 800-171 requirements for handling CUI.
